text.tspan: A scheduled pipeline run starts and acquires secrets needed to connect to external
Data Factory extracts data from multiple sources and lands raw/staged files in the
Data Factory performs transformations and loads curated datasets into the Azure SQL
Purview scans the landing/staging area to catalog new assets and classify sensitive
Purview scans the Azure SQL warehouse to capture schemas, lineage, and business
End users authenticate via Entra ID and Power BI Embedded obtains tokens to render
Power BI Embedded queries the SQL warehouse to populate visuals and enable
Operational health and failures from pipeline runs are sent to Azure Monitor and
retained in Log Analytics for investigation.
